rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution around processing-fluency-based typicality effects and even reports reversals in effect sign, while the cited paper is a fluency/metacognitive-difficulty boundary-condition study that documents evaluation reversals. That construct-level overlap (fluency interpretation and reversals) suggests the citation could be a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a purely incidental mention, even though the evidence here is only a DOI match without local citation text.
